name: deed_date_present
expression: deed_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(deed_date)) > 0
description: deed_date is required for Deed extraction.

name: deed_type_present
expression: deed_type IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(deed_type)) > 0
description: deed_type is required for Deed extraction.

name: grantor_names_present
expression: grantor_names IS NOT NULL AND JSON_ARRAY_LENGTH(grantor_names) > 0
description: grantor_names is required for Deed extraction.

name: grantee_names_present
expression: grantee_names IS NOT NULL AND JSON_ARRAY_LENGTH(grantee_names) > 0
description: grantee_names is required for Deed extraction.

name: legal_description_present
expression: legal_description IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(legal_description)) > 0
description: legal_description is required for Deed extraction.

name: consideration_amount_non_negative
description: consideration_amount should be non-negative when present.

name: transfer_tax_amount_non_negative
description: transfer_tax_amount should be non-negative when present.
